name: Schiaparelli EDM
fact: ExoMars 2016 Entry, Descent, Landing Demonstrator. A control software fault caused the inertial measurement unit to saturate during parachute deployment, which led the lander to compute a negative altitude and release its parachute prematurely. It free-fell ~3.7 km to the surface. The flight data informed the ExoMars 2028 EDL redesign.
capability: Hard-won EDL diagnostic data — a partial demonstration that fed forward into the next ExoMars mission.
